safe_modes: patch only caller-supplied old 32-bit values to 1194
stage output file; never overwrite source
notes: beat_crime_wagonthief.wsc is the right first target because it already contains active wagon-thief/vehicle behavior.
This kit does not invent a truck id. It is car-only around known id 1194.
If the script payload cannot be decrypted/decompressed locally, direct WSC editing remains blocked.
